note: Product source for air compressors, compressor services, controls, pumps, parts, and distributor footprint.

note: Market-data source for Ingersoll Rand market capitalization and market-cap history.

note: Market-data source for Ingersoll Rand revenue history including 2025 and TTM revenue.

note: Market-data source for Ingersoll Rand EBIT-style earnings history.

title: OpenPLC Project
note: Open-source PLC project homepage used as a control-stack alternative and compressor-room retrofit enabler.

title: OpenPLC GitHub Repository
note: Source-code repository for OpenPLC, supporting openness and readiness assessment.

title: OpenEnergyMonitor System Overview
note: Documents the open-source hardware and software stack for local energy monitoring and EmonCMS data logging.

title: OpenPneu: Compact platform for pneumatic actuation with multi-channels
note: Research source for an open-source pneumatic actuation platform using micro-pumps and a Python control interface, relevant to small-scale pneumatic alternatives.

title: HiPeristaltic GitHub Repository
note: Open-source multi-channel peristaltic pump project used as a low-flow pump and fluidics hardware primitive.

title: Metafluidics Open Repository for Fluidic Systems
note: Open repository for fluidic-system parts and design files relevant to decentralized fluidics prototyping.

title: Metafluidics: Open Repository for Fluidic Systems
note: Project overview describing Metafluidics as an open-source, community-driven repository with digital design files, assembly specifications, and bills of materials.

title: Open Source Hardware Definition
note: Defines the open hardware model used to assess whether physical alternatives are meaningfully open and reproducible.
